query:
UPDATE product_variants
SET isDefault = 0
WHERE productId = 60016 
  AND isDefault = 1
  AND id NOT IN (
    SELECT id FROM (
      SELECT id
      FROM product_variants
      WHERE productId = 60016 AND isDefault = 1
      ORDER BY createdAt DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) AS latest
  );
